notes: Curated press/letter seeds for activist campaigns that may not appear as SC 13D/DFAN. Consumed by press_activist_digest.py.

campaigns.title: Third Point Sends Letter to Board of Directors of CoStar Group
campaigns.body_text: Third Point LLC sent a letter to the Board of Directors of CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) urging board change, compensation reform, and a strategic review of Homes.com / residential businesses after the standstill with Third Point and D.E. Shaw expired.

campaigns.title: The D. E. Shaw Group Releases Open Letter and Presentation to the Board of Directors of CoStar Group
campaigns.body_text: The D. E. Shaw group sent an open letter and presentation to the Board of Directors of CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP) expressing disappointment with capital allocation to Homes.com and supporting shareholder-driven change at the 2026 Annual Meeting.

campaigns.title: D.E. Shaw Group Letter to CoStar Board: Reduced Transparency and Accountability
campaigns.body_text: Letter from Edwin Jager and Michael O'Mary of D. E. Shaw & Co., L.P. to the Board of Directors of CoStar Group, Inc. criticizing reduced Homes.com segment transparency and accountability. Investment funds managed by DESCO LP beneficially own or have an economic interest in CoStar (CSGP) shares.
